name: Basil-Cumin-Fennel Potatoes
recipeIngredient: x  Potatoes, cooked peeled, and cut into 1/2 inch dice
x  Fennel seeds (these should add the main flavors)
x  Lots of fresh chopped basil (canned, dried would be acceptable)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat some oil in a pan.
2. When hot, add the cumin and fennel seeds.
3. After a few seconds, add the potatoes along with salt, black pepper, and cayenne.
4. Fry the potatoes, stirring occasionally, until they get crusty.
5. About one minute before serving, add the basil.
6. These can be eaten plain or wrapped in a flour tortilla with yogurt, or in pita bread with yogurt. If combining them with yogurt, use slightly heavier spices, as the yogurt is fairly bland.
